coveredConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: field scope and boundary evidence subset
coveredConstructs.notes: Draft bridge export covers the stable field-scope subset used in reversible rehearsal.

coveredConstructs.ofarmTargetRef: operation claim plus execution evidence subset
coveredConstructs.notes: Only the declared task subset is exported for reversible round-trip rehearsal.
The bridge export remains limited to the declared equipment and material reference subset.

droppedConstructs.notes: Frozen filing lineage remains inside OFARM and is not emitted into draft ISOXML bridge output.

approximatedConstructs.externalConstructRef: ISOXML task controller execution status detail
approximatedConstructs.notes: Fine-grained status detail may collapse into the declared ISOXML bridge subset.

notes: Draft ISOXML export bridge for same-standard declared-subset rehearsal only; it does not make ISOXML a canonical OFARM truth transport.
